page_content:
Prerequisite: MUSC360.

Restriction: Must be in a major within the ARHU-School of Music department.

Credit Only Granted for. MUSC330 or MUSC361.

MUSC369 Special Topics in Study Abroad III (1-6 Credits) Special topics course taken as part of an approved study abroad program.

Repeatable to: 15 credits if content differs.
